title: erigeron inornatus var. inornatus
intro: Erigeron inornatus var. inornatus, also known as a species of daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, sore throats, and fever, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and prevent infection. Erigeron inornatus var. inornatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural healers.
